title: vSudo
description: Force placers to chat and send proxy commands over velocity proxy
body:
# vSudo Make players send chat messages and run proxy commands from the velocity proxy. # Requirements * Velocity Proxy * Chat signing disabled on backed server. * You must have chat signing disabled on the backend server for the chat function to work.
* To easily do this, add a plugin such as [AntiPopup](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/%E2%9C%A8-antipopup-no-chat-reports-and-popup-%E2%9C%A8.103782/) or [NoEncryption](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/noencryption.102902/) to your backed server and the plugin should work as intended.
* You must also set `enforce-secure-profiles` in `server.properties` to `false` # Commands * `/vsudo reload` * Reloads the vSudo config * `/vsudo [message:/command]` * Sudo a player to send a chat message or run a proxy command. * This command can be run by console or another player in game * `/vsudo * ` * Sudo all players on a specific server to send a message or run a proxy command * This command can be run by console or another player in game * This command can be disabled in the config under `sudo-all.enabled` # Permissions * `vsudo.sudo` * Access to the `/vsudo` command * `vsudo.sudo.all` * Access to the `/vsudo *` command # Support & Contact To report bugs, suggest a feature, or anything else, contact me via discord - Direct Contact * -> [ajmac](http://discord.com/users/643604666634076179) # bStats ![bstats](https://bstats.org/signatures/velocity/vsudo.svg)
